source: Smelling Salts Review — extracted from conversation history line 81 (GitHub Innovation Master List)
name: The Protection Layer — Bullshit Detector + Dialect-Specific Voice AI
description: The Protection Layer is Maven's shield function — protecting Ruby Red from the three gangster worlds. It contains two critical innovations identified in the GitHub Innovation Master List as top-5 gaps.

bullshit_detector.name: The Bullshit Detector
bullshit_detector.description: Flags predatory offers, scams, and unfair terms before Ruby signs anything. When Ruby receives a 'pre-approved credit card offer' with 29.9% interest, Grace says: 'Hold on. Let me look at this. This is not what it seems.'
triggers: Ruby receives a financial offer (credit card, loan, insurance)
Ruby is about to sign a contract or agreement
Ruby is targeted by a payday lender or rent-to-own scheme
bullshit_detector.grace_behavior: Grace intercepts the offer, analyzes the terms, and presents a plain-language summary: 'Here's what they're not telling you.' Grace then suggests alternatives from Maven's network.
bullshit_detector.connection_to_puppet_strings: The Bullshit Detector is the real-time version of the Puppet Strings Report — catching predatory behavior as it happens, not just reporting on it monthly.

dialect_specific_voice.name: Dialect-Specific Voice AI
dialect_specific_voice.description: Grace must speak like a neighbor, not a corporate entity. Critical gap identified: Grace as a corporate voice vs. Grace as a neighbor. The difference between adoption and abandonment.
dialect_specific_voice.importance: HIGH — Ruby Red will not trust an AI that sounds like a bank. Grace must sound like the woman next door who happens to know about finances.
implementation_notes: Voice AI must match Ruby's community dialect and cadence
Different voice profiles for different neighborhoods/regions
Warm, conversational tone — never clinical or corporate
Sassy when appropriate, gentle when needed, fierce when protecting
technology_options: KIE.ai for voice synthesis with dialect training
Custom voice models trained on community speech patterns

connection_to_innovation_master_list.gap_ranking: Items 3 and 4 of the top 5 critical gaps identified across 972 files in 12 repositories
full_gap_list: 1. Maven Data Cooperative — without it, Maven is just another platform extracting value
2. Need Milk Money + Emergency Fund — advice without action
3. Dialect-Specific Voice AI — Grace as corporate voice vs. neighbor
4. The Protection Layer (Bullshit Detector + Puppet Strings Report) — Maven as shield
5. The Swarm Mind Avatar Architecture — Grace as a team, not a chatbot

build_complexity: HIGH — Bullshit Detector requires real-time offer analysis and financial product database. Dialect Voice requires custom voice model training.
